github.headersHelper: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gh = 'C:\Users\WindowS 10\AppData\Local\Programs\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe'; $t = & $gh auth token 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $t) { $token = $t.Trim(); Write-Output ('{\"Authorization\":\"Bearer ' + $token + '\"}') } else { Write-Output '{}' }"
